verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All the way, I'm going all the way, All the way, I'm going all the way, All the way, I'm going all the way, I'm going all the way with the Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've made my choice, I'm going all the way, I've made my choice, I'm going all the way, I've made my choice, I'm going all the way, I'm going all the way with the lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've made my decision, I'm going all the way, I've made my decision, I'm going all the way, I've made my decision, I'm going all the way, I'm going all the way with the Lord.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: No turning back, I'm going all the way, No turning back, I'm going all the way, No turning back, I'm going all the way, I'm going all the way with the Lord.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I've draw the line I'm going all the way, I've draw the line I'm going all the way, I've draw the line I'm going all the way, I'm going all the way with the Lord.
